dialog.stepLabel: Talkie: "Dhalifa is back! Dhalifa is back!..."

items.speaker: Talkie
items.text: Dhalifa is back! Dhalifa is back!

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Haha, you could say that. Whenever the others came to visit, they'd always set up this little tent for me, so I'd feel at home.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Back then, I couldn't tell them how much it helped my homesickness. It became really precious, especially after everything that happened...

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: But let's not dwell on sad things today! We've placed plenty of supply chests all around the Observatory, enough for every researcher to find what they need.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: And you, as our top contributor, can help yourself to any of them! I even asked Talkie to bring some just for you. Here, I'll unlock them. You can open them now!

options.text: Leave it to me! I'm a pro at this!
